dialogues.they_en: When am I going to the operating room?
dialogues.you_es: En unos treinta minutos vamos a llevarle.
dialogues.you_en: We'll take you in about thirty minutes.

dialogues.you_es: Vamos a moverle con cuidado. Avíseme si duele.
dialogues.you_en: We'll move you carefully. Tell me if it hurts.

dialogues.you_es: No, guarde las medicinas en casa.
dialogues.you_en: No, keep your medications at home.

dialogues.they_en: I have an infection. Is it dangerous?
Should I wear a special gown?
dialogues.you_es: Sí, vamos a ponerle esta bata quirúrgica.
dialogues.you_en: Yes, we'll put on this surgical gown.

dialogues.you_es: Sí, para proteger sus ojos durante la cirugía.
dialogues.you_en: Yes, to protect your eyes during surgery.

dialogues.they_en: Will you clean my room after?
dialogues.you_es: Sí, los EVS limpian todo con desinfectante.
dialogues.you_en: Yes, housekeeping cleans everything with disinfectant.

dialogues.you_es: Guarde sus gafas. Nosotros guardamos todo.
dialogues.you_en: Keep your glasses safe. We'll store everything.
